specs.title: AUTH-LOGIN: validation, reveal, Enter submit, refresh and logout
AUTH-REGISTER: invalid, weak, unique success and duplicate
AUTH-RESET: created user request, invalid token and live delivery
AUTH-ROOT, AUTH-AUTHED-PUBLIC and AUTH-PROTECTED route guards
ANON redirects to login before dashboard data is requested
AADM renders full, survives reload, and preserves source readback
EADM renders full, survives reload, and preserves source readback
PLAN renders partial, survives reload, and preserves source readback
RES renders forbidden, survives reload, and preserves source readback
BADM renders empty, survives reload, and preserves source readback
RES sees deterministic source 500, Retry issues a new request, then recovers to forbidden
AADM: rows resolve user names and project labels
EADM: rows resolve user names and project labels
PLAN: rows resolve user names and project labels
AADM: Kanban/List tabs and task filter preserve the same data
AADM: allowed status change has network, API readback, reload and restore
EADM: allowed status change has network, API readback, reload and restore
PLAN: allowed status change has network, API readback, reload and restore
PLAN: no affordance for another user's task and direct write is 403 unchanged
RES: forbidden My Work has no write affordance and direct write is 403 unchanged
BADM: empty tenant is isolated from alpha tasks
AADM: deterministic My Work 5xx shows retry and recovers on the next request
AADM: /profile and /settings expose the role-correct edit shape
EADM: /profile and /settings expose the role-correct edit shape
PLAN: /profile and /settings expose the role-correct edit shape
RES: /profile and /settings expose the role-correct edit shape
BADM: /profile and /settings expose the role-correct edit shape
